purpose: Lightweight per-session handoff log. One block per session tracking what happened and where the next session picks up. Details live in progress-phase2.json (source of truth) — do NOT duplicate decisions/build-order/state here.
how_to_use: APPEND one new block to handoffs[] at the end of each session (newest last). Never rewrite prior blocks. Bump version.

handoffs.did: Deep-planned S2, S3, S4 (were scope-only). Recorded sync/async model + blocking-call decision in S1.4/S1-D13. Phase 2 planning now COMPLETE for all 4 sections.
handoffs.next: Build Phase 2 S1 V1 (custom-LLM orchestration loop) — the gating dependency for S2/S3/S4.
handoffs.start_from: progress-phase2.json -> S1_agent_design.S1_SUMMARY.v1_build_order (steps 1-7). Follow CLAUDE.md strictly (esp. web-verify LiteLLM/Gemini + VAPI shapes before coding the LLM layer).
handoffs.handoff_summary: What this session did: Deep-planned the three remaining Phase 2 sections — S2 (CRM/Memory), S3 (Logging/Tracing), S4 (Post-processing/Metrics). Phase 2 planning is now complete for all four sections. Also recorded the sync/async architecture decision (S1-D13) and created this handoff log. Key decisions locked: (1) One shared SQLite DB (data/conversations.db, stdlib sqlite3, no new dep) is the substrate for S2 (calls, messages), S3 (turns trace), and S4 (metrics-as-SQL). (2) Cross-call memory read-side pulled into V1 — two-tier and gated (recognition pre-verification, recall only after identity_verified, claim_status never in memory). (3) S3 trace -> turns table, written after the SSE stream closes; token counts via LiteLLM usage (include_usage + token_counter fallback). (4) S4 post-processing is our own synchronous LiteLLM pass in the end-of-call webhook (drops Phase 1 polling); flat structured output {summary, sentiment, resolution_status, primary_topic}; containment is code-derived, never the LLM; metrics compute pulled into V1 (app/metrics.py, pure SQL). (5) Sync/async: async FastAPI, one concurrent asyncio task (the extractor), caller-facing work stays sequential; blocking requests/sqlite accepted at single-caller demo scale. State: no Phase 2 code yet; Phase 1 (VAPI-native) still the working demo fallback — don't touch except the reused end-of-call webhook. Where the next session starts: build S1 V1 (the custom-LLM orchestration loop) — it's the gating dependency; S2/S3/S4 all hook into it. Follow progress-phase2.json -> S1_agent_design.S1_SUMMARY.v1_build_order (steps 1-7). Per CLAUDE.md, web-verify before coding the LLM layer: LiteLLM<->Gemini 2.5 Flash exact model id + streaming + tool-calling API, and the VAPI incoming /chat/completions messages shape. Note: litellm is missing from requirements.txt (only google-generativeai is there) — add it.
